titleStmt.title: SII 25.44: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 44. (A.R. No. 44 of 1908.) MĒṬṬUPAṬṬI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North, South and East walls of a temple on the hill.
The inscription is dated Śaka 1410, Kīlaka and Tai.

It records a gift of lands as dēvadāna to the deity Siddhamalai-nāyiṉār by a certain Timmāchchi-nāyakkar Tirumalaiyaṉ of Toṇḍai-maṇḍalam. The gift land is said to be in Kariyappaṉkōṭṭai which was situated in Puṟamalai Kallaga-nāḍu. The donor is said to have obtained the same as a private property (svaya-gata-dānam) from his overlord Mahābali-Bāṇādhirājar.
It may be said that this Bāṇa chief belongs to the later Bāṇa family who were governing from Madurai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 10 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa kilaka varuṣam tai mātam 6 toṇṭaimaṇṭalam timmācci nāyakkar tirumalaiyaneṉ nāyiṉāṟ cittamalai Uṭaiyāṟku kuṭutta tevatāṉamāvatu puṟamalai kallakaṉā l Eṉakku nāyinār mahābalībāṇādhirājar cuyakatat taṉmamāka tanta cīrmaiyil kariyappaṉ koṭṭaikku va kaṟpittu viṭṭa tevatāṉattukku nāṉkellai Āvatu . Ikkuḷattu kīḻkaṭaikkompil poṟṟaikkum cūlakallukkum meṟku kariyappaṉ koṭṭaikku vaṭakku Āttikaṇavāyku merk kuṟapokum vaḻikku kiḻakkuk cittamaṉa Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey Eppaṭṭaṟpaṭṭaṉavum candrāditya varaiyum tevatāṉamāka Anubhavittuk koḷḷavum . Ittevatāṉattil tirupputtur paramasvāmi bhaktanukku sarvvamā(n)nyam rūpāy 2ṭṭa . Inta tevatāṉattukku Ahitam ceytavaṉ
gaṅgaikkaraiyile govaiyum brāhmaṇaraiyum guruvaiyum vadhai ceytavaṉ poṉa pāpattile povatākavum . Ippaṭikku tirumalaiyaṉ Eḻuttu § .
Digital edition of SII 25.44 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
